# `nise plugins update`

- **Usage**: `nise plugins update [-j --jobs <JOBS>] [PLUGIN]…`
- **Aliases**: `up`, `upgrade`
- **Source code**: [`src/cli/plugins/update.rs`](https://github.com/jdx/mise/blob/main/src/cli/plugins/update.rs)

Updates a plugin to the latest version

note: this updates the plugin itself, not the runtime versions

## Arguments

### `[PLUGIN]…`

Plugin(s) to update

## Flags

### `-j --jobs <JOBS>`

Number of jobs to run in parallel
Default: 4

Examples:

```
$ nise plugins update              # update all plugins
$ nise plugins update cmake       # update only cmake
$ nise plugins update cmake#beta  # specify a ref
```
